user_id.description: ID of the user who created the thread

model_id.description: ID of the model to use for the thread

overall_op_view_state.description: state is either 'default', 'result' or 'error'. If thread_op_view_state and replies_op_view_state are result this will return result, if either are error it will return error, otherwise default

error_message.description: if state.overall_op_view_state is error, this will return the error message from either thread_op_view_state or replies_op_view_state

message.description: Content of the post, supports rich text format

value.description: Get a thread and its main post by thread id

thread_id.description: ID of the thread to get

value.description: Edit a thread title and/or main post message. Only the thread creator can edit the thread.
Get all replies for a post by post id

post_id.description: ID of the post to get replies for

main_post_reaction_counts_server.description: Raw response count from the server, not updated with local modifications

main_post_reaction_counts_local.description: Initially seeded from the server and updated with local modifications (e.g. if the user adds a thumbs up reaction, the count for thumbs up in this variable will be increased by 1 even before we get the response from the server)

update_main_post_local_counts_from_serve.description: Map over main_post_reaction_counts_server and update main_post_reaction_counts_local with the counts from the server.

update_main_post_local_counts_remove_use.description: If state.main_post_user_reaction is not empty, suctract 1 from state.main_post_reaction_counts_local.<main_post_user_reaction>

get_non_zero_main_post_reactions.description: Get a list of reactions that have counts greater than 0 in main_post_reaction_counts_local
